name: ideaforge
description: A domain-agnostic think-tank as an 11-agent team: turn any idea, problem, or need into an honest, tested verdict. The Facilitator frames the question and picks a mode; the thinkers generate, ground in cited evidence, run a premortem, weigh ethics, and scan the future; the Strategist scores options and gives a recommendation + next action. Five modes (Spark, Crucible, Horizon, Verdict, Roundtable), two gates, optional AppFactory build brief. Bilingual RO/EN.
